name: leukotriene C4 to hydrogen acceptor
summary: A 14-step route from leukotriene C4(2−) to hydrogen acceptor, ingested from Rhea. Every step is curated by Rhea and independently verified here to balance in mass and charge.

enzymes.name: anaerobic magnesium-protoporphyrin IX monomethyl ester cyclase

reactions.name: leukotriene-C4 synthase
reactions.equation: leukotriene C4 = leukotriene A4 + glutathione

reactions.name: leukotriene-A4 hydrolase
reactions.equation: leukotriene A4 + H2O = leukotriene B4

reactions.name: leukotriene-B4 20-monooxygenase
reactions.equation: leukotriene B4 + reduced [NADPH--hemoprotein reductase] + O2 = 20-hydroxy-leukotriene B4 + oxidized [NADPH--hemoprotein reductase] + H2O + H(+)

reactions.name: 20-hydroxy-leukotriene B4 + reduced [NADPH--hemoprotein reductase] + O2 = 20-oxo-leukot...
reactions.equation: 20-hydroxy-leukotriene B4 + reduced [NADPH--hemoprotein reductase] + O2 = 20-oxo-leukotriene B4 + oxidized [NADPH--hemoprotein reductase] + 2 H2O + H(+)

reactions.name: 20-oxo-leukotriene B4 + reduced [NADPH--hemoprotein reductase] + O2 = 20-carboxy-leukot...
reactions.equation: 20-oxo-leukotriene B4 + reduced [NADPH--hemoprotein reductase] + O2 = 20-carboxy-leukotriene B4 + oxidized [NADPH--hemoprotein reductase] + H2O + 2 H(+)

reactions.name: 7-oxoheptanoyl-[ACP] + oxidized [flavodoxin] + H2O = 6-carboxyhexanoyl-[ACP] + reduced ...
reactions.equation: 7-oxoheptanoyl-[ACP] + oxidized [flavodoxin] + H2O = 6-carboxyhexanoyl-[ACP] + reduced [flavodoxin]

reactions.name: 8-amino-7-oxononanoate synthase
reactions.equation: 6-carboxyhexanoyl-[ACP] + L-alanine + H(+) = (8S)-8-amino-7-oxononanoate + holo-[ACP] + CO2

reactions.name: adenosylmethionine--8-amino-7-oxononanoate transaminase
reactions.equation: (8S)-8-amino-7-oxononanoate + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = S-adenosyl-4-methylsulfanyl-2-oxobutanoate + (7R,8S)-7,8-diammoniononanoate

reactions.name: dethiobiotin synthase
reactions.equation: (7R,8S)-7,8-diammoniononanoate + CO2 + ATP = (4R,5S)-dethiobiotin + ADP + phosphate + 3 H(+)

reactions.name: biotin synthase
reactions.equation: (4R,5S)-dethiobiotin + (sulfur carrier)-SH + 2 reduced [2Fe-2S]-[ferredoxin] + 2 S-adenosyl-L-methionine = (sulfur carrier)-H + biotin + 2 5'-deoxyadenosine + 2 L-methionine + 2 oxidized [2Fe-2S]-[ferredoxin]

reactions.name: S-sulfanyl-L-cysteinyl-[cysteine desulfurase] + (sulfur carrier)-H = L-cysteinyl-[cyste...
reactions.equation: S-sulfanyl-L-cysteinyl-[cysteine desulfurase] + (sulfur carrier)-H = L-cysteinyl-[cysteine desulfurase] + (sulfur carrier)-SH

reactions.name: N(6)-dimethylallyladenosine(37) in tRNA + (sulfur carrier)-SH + AH2 + S-adenosyl-L-meth...
reactions.equation: N(6)-dimethylallyladenosine(37) in tRNA + (sulfur carrier)-SH + AH2 + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = 2-thio-N(6)-dimethylallyladenosine(37) in tRNA + (sulfur carrier)-H + 5'-deoxyadenosine + L-methionine + A + H(+)

reactions.name: 2-thio-N(6)-dimethylallyladenosine(37) in tRNA + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = 2-methylsulf...
reactions.equation: 2-thio-N(6)-dimethylallyladenosine(37) in tRNA + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = 2-methylsulfanyl-N(6)-dimethylallyladenosine(37) in tRNA + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+)

reactions.name: tRNA 2-(methylsulfanyl)-N(6)-isopentenyladenosine(37) hydroxylase
reactions.equation: 2-methylsulfanyl-N(6)-dimethylallyladenosine(37) in tRNA + AH2 + O2 = N(6)-[(2E)-4-hydroxy-3-methylbut-2-en-1-yl]-2-(methylsulfanyl)adenosine(37) in tRNA + A + H2O

reactions.name: leukotriene A4 + H2O = (5S,6R)-dihydroxy-(7E,9E,11Z,14Z)-eicosatetraenoate
reactions.equation: leukotriene A4 + H2O = (5S,6R)-dihydroxy-(7E,9E,11Z,14Z)-eicosatetraenoate

reactions.name: glutathione peroxidase
reactions.equation: 2 glutathione + H2O2 = glutathione disulfide + 2 H2O

reactions.name: phospholipid-hydroperoxide glutathione peroxidase
reactions.equation: a hydroperoxy polyunsaturated fatty acid + 2 glutathione = a hydroxy polyunsaturated fatty acid + glutathione disulfide + H2O

reactions.name: leukotriene B4 + NADP(+) = 12-oxo-leukotriene B4 + NADPH + H(+)
reactions.equation: leukotriene B4 + NADP(+) = 12-oxo-leukotriene B4 + NADPH + H(+)

reactions.name: leukotriene B4 + reduced [NADPH--hemoprotein reductase] + O2 = 19-hydroxy-leukotriene B...
reactions.equation: leukotriene B4 + reduced [NADPH--hemoprotein reductase] + O2 = 19-hydroxy-leukotriene B4 + oxidized [NADPH--hemoprotein reductase] + H2O + H(+)

reactions.name: 20-hydroxy-leukotriene B4 + NADP(+) = 12-oxo-20-hydroxy-leukotriene B4 + NADPH + H(+)
reactions.equation: 20-hydroxy-leukotriene B4 + NADP(+) = 12-oxo-20-hydroxy-leukotriene B4 + NADPH + H(+)

reactions.name: tyrosine N-monooxygenase
reactions.equation: L-tyrosine + 2 reduced [NADPH--hemoprotein reductase] + 2 O2 = (E)-4-hydroxyphenylacetaldehyde oxime + 2 oxidized [NADPH--hemoprotein reductase] + CO2 + 3 H2O + 2 H(+)

reactions.name: premnaspirodiene oxygenase
reactions.equation: (-)-vetispiradiene + 2 reduced [NADPH--hemoprotein reductase] + 2 O2 = solavetivone + 2 oxidized [NADPH--hemoprotein reductase] + 3 H2O + 2 H(+)

reactions.name: linalool 8-monooxygenase
reactions.equation: linalool + 2 reduced [NADPH--hemoprotein reductase] + 2 O2 = (6E)-8-oxolinalool + 2 oxidized [NADPH--hemoprotein reductase] + 3 H2O + 2 H(+)

reactions.name: homomethionine N-monooxygenase
reactions.equation: L-dihomomethionine + 2 reduced [NADPH--hemoprotein reductase] + 2 O2 = (E)-5-(methylsulfanyl)pentanal oxime + 2 oxidized [NADPH--hemoprotein reductase] + CO2 + 3 H2O + 2 H(+)

reactions.name: (8S)-8-amino-7-oxononanoate + L-lysyl-[protein] + NADPH + H(+) = N(6)-[(2S,3R)-2-amino-...
reactions.equation: (8S)-8-amino-7-oxononanoate + L-lysyl-[protein] + NADPH + H(+) = N(6)-[(2S,3R)-2-amino-8-carboxyoctan-3-yl]-L-lysyl-[protein] + NADP(+) + H2O

reactions.name: (8S)-8-amino-7-oxononanoate + L-lysyl-[protein] + NADH + H(+) = N(6)-[(2S,3R)-2-amino-8...
reactions.equation: (8S)-8-amino-7-oxononanoate + L-lysyl-[protein] + NADH + H(+) = N(6)-[(2S,3R)-2-amino-8-carboxyoctan-3-yl]-L-lysyl-[protein] + NAD(+) + H2O

reactions.name: [acyl-carrier-protein] S-malonyltransferase
reactions.equation: holo-[ACP] + malonyl-CoA = malonyl-[ACP] + CoA

reactions.name: glycerol-3-phosphate acyltransferase (acyl-[acyl-carrier-protein]-
reactions.equation: a fatty acyl-[ACP] + sn-glycerol 3-phosphate = a 1-acyl-sn-glycero-3-phosphate + holo-[ACP]

reactions.name: spermidine--8-amino-7-oxononanoate transaminase
reactions.equation: (8S)-8-amino-7-oxononanoate + spermidine = N-(3-aminopropyl)-4-aminobutanal + (7R,8S)-7,8-diammoniononanoate

reactions.name: biotinidase
reactions.equation: biocytin + H2O = biotin + L-lysine

reactions.name: 23S rRNA (adenine(2503)-C(2))-methyltransferase
reactions.equation: adenosine(37) in tRNA + 2 reduced [2Fe-2S]-[ferredoxin] + 2 S-adenosyl-L-methionine = 2-methyladenosine(37) in tRNA + 5'-deoxyadenosine + L-methionine + 2 oxidized [2Fe-2S]-[ferredoxin] + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine

reactions.name: neomycin C + AH2 + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = neomycin B + 5'-deoxyadenosine + L-methion...
reactions.equation: neomycin C + AH2 + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = neomycin B + 5'-deoxyadenosine + L-methionine + A + H(+)

reactions.name: anaerobic magnesium-protoporphyrin IX monomethyl ester cyclase
reactions.equation: Mg-protoporphyrin IX 13-monomethyl ester + 3 S-adenosyl-L-methionine + H2O = 3,8-divinyl protochlorophyllide a + 3 5'-deoxyadenosine + 3 L-methionine + 4 H(+)

reactions.name: GTP 3',8-cyclase
reactions.equation: GTP + AH2 + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = (8S)-3',8-cyclo-7,8-dihydroguanosine 5'-triphosphate + 5'-deoxyadenosine + L-methionine + A + H(+)

reactions.name: formylmethanofuran dehydrogenase
reactions.equation: N-formylmethanofuran + 2 oxidized [2Fe-2S]-[ferredoxin] + H2O = methanofuran + 2 reduced [2Fe-2S]-[ferredoxin] + CO2 + H(+)

reactions.name: red chlorophyll catabolite reductase
reactions.equation: primary fluorescent chlorophyll catabolite + 2 oxidized [2Fe-2S]-[ferredoxin] = red chlorophyll catabolite + 2 reduced [2Fe-2S]-[ferredoxin] + 3 H(+)

reactions.name: L-cysteinyl-[cysteine desulfurase] + L-cysteine = S-sulfanyl-L-cysteinyl-[cysteine desu...
reactions.equation: L-cysteinyl-[cysteine desulfurase] + L-cysteine = S-sulfanyl-L-cysteinyl-[cysteine desulfurase] + L-alanine

reactions.name: palmitoyl-protein hydrolase
reactions.equation: S-hexadecanoyl-L-cysteinyl-[protein] + H2O = L-cysteinyl-[protein] + hexadecanoate + H(+)

reactions.name: quinoline 2-oxidoreductase
reactions.equation: quinolin-8-ol + A + H2O = 8-hydroxyquinolin-2(1H)-one + AH2

reactions.name: quinoline 2-oxidoreductase
reactions.equation: 3-methylquinoline + A + H2O = 3-methylquinolin-2(1H)-one + AH2
